mapper.select: SELECT sdt.id, sdt.dict_name, sdt.dict_type, sdt.sort_order, sdt.status, sdt.remark FROM sys_dict_type sdt WHERE sdt.del_flag = '0' AND sdt.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_dict_type SET del_flag = '0' WHERE del_flag = '0' AND id IN
#{item}
UPDATE sys_dict_type SET status = 1 WHERE del_flag = '0' AND id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_dict_type SET status = 0 WHERE del_flag = '0' AND id = #{id}
